summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Profile, Notifications, and Group Application features. All 18 backend API tests passed, and all 15 frontend UI test cases verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - React hydration issue from dev tooling injection, not breaking functionality

seed_data_creation: Backend tests updated admin user's display_name (TEST_AdminDisplay_*) and notification_prefs during testing. Group application for grp_07895f92 was approved during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Profile, Notifications, and Group Application features are fully functional. Admin username is @HSSA. The Twilio SMS integration is STUBBED (gracefully skips when env vars not configured). Email notifications via Resend are working.

backend_group_application_tests: 16. Group application creation flow works (for creators)
frontend_tests: 3. Group Applications tab visible on Admin Dashboard
4. Group Applications section renders with table
6. Settings tab visible on Member Dashboard
7. Profile section with Display Name input
11. Property Groups section visible (for authenticated users)
13. Create Group modal has Group Type select
14. Create Group modal has is-couple checkbox
15. Application status badge shows on group cards

mocked_integrations.twilio_sms: STUBBED - gracefully skips when TWILIO env vars not configured
mocked_integrations.resend_email: WORKING - real emails sent via Resend API

admin_dashboard.notification_bell: Bell icon visible with unread count badge, dropdown shows notifications with 'Mark all read' button
admin_dashboard.group_applications_tab: Table with Group name, Property location, Members count, Submitted By, Date, Status, and Approve/Reject actions

member_dashboard_settings.profile_section: Avatar with upload button, username display (@HSSA), Display Name input field
member_dashboard_settings.notification_prefs: Three toggle switches for In-App, Email, and SMS notifications
member_dashboard_settings.change_password: Form with Current Password, New Password, and Confirm New Password fields

property_detail_page.groups_section: Header 'Groups for This Property' with '+ Create Group' button
property_detail_page.group_cards: Show group name, type, member count, spots left, and action buttons (Group Chat, Joined, Delete)
property_detail_page.application_status: 'APPLICATION APPROVED' badge shown for approved group applications
